caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black t-shirt with a yellow logo, is presented in a picture-in-picture overlay in the bottom right corner of a screen. He is seated in a room with a computer monitor and other equipment visible behind him. The main screen display consists of a Google Sheets spreadsheet titled "TH 5/13 - 2021 TOPPS TRANSCENDENT COLLECTION HALL OF FAME EDITION BASEBA...". A separate inset window shows a cardboard box with the word "TRANSCENDENT" printed on it. At the bottom of the screen, a red banner contains the text "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" next to a red "Subscribe" button, and a website address reads "WWW.JAEPYSKALEBREAKS.COM". Between the initial and final frames, the spreadsheet is updated to include a list of items, starting with "(1) 1989 Topps Baseball Superfoot Autograph #1 of 1".
